title: Hum Hai Teen Khurafaati
overview: Amidst dreams of making it big in the world of Bollywood, three teen boys are caught between a sexy teacher, a lecherous Principal and the love of their lives. Rohit, Rahul and Raju are enjoying and exploring their college life, trying to hit on their classmates and crushing on their hot teacher Roopmani who teaches about their 'internal desires' and 'love'.
